# Q 

2 

M 

BALDWIPE EVO

## Interior / Accessories

### Low pile meets high performance. The all-rounder among microfibres.

The low-pile, edgeless Q²M BaldWipe EVO is gentle yet very effective. It is equally effective for cleaning, polishing, or maintaining a vehicle. It removes the remnants of polishing pastes without leaving marks or light scratches: an utterly new microfibre weave and a higher GSM than before increase softness and absorbency. Ultrasonic cutting provides a precise and safe edgeless finish.

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2016/10/productmain_1700x1645px_q2m_baldwipe-1024x991.jpg)

[Technical Details](#technical-details)

## TECHNICAL DETAILS

SIZES 

40x40 cm

## HOW TO USE

Q 

2 

M 

BALDWIPE EVO

01
Use on clean and dry surfaces. 

02
Wipe gently to remove coating or product residue. 

03
Turn the towel frequently to a clean side. 

04
Avoid excessive pressure during wipe off. 

05
Wash after use to maintain fibre performance. 

## FREQUENTLY ASKED
QUESTIONS

01
What is BALDWIPE EVO best used for? 

Coating removal, inspection and final wipe downs.

02
Why is a short nap important? 

It prevents residue masking and improves control.

03
Is it safe on soft paint? 

Yes, when used gently on clean surfaces.

04
Can it be reused? 

Yes, with proper washing and care.

05
How should it be maintained? 

Machine wash up to 30°C. Do not tumble dry, iron or bleach.

[FIND MORE ANSWERS](https://gyeon.zendesk.com/hc/en-us/sections/360000266798-Q-M-BaldWipe)

## Recommended Pairing

We recommend complementary products that perfectly match your current one, creating a complete and convenient KIT. Together, they deliver the best performance and a seamless user experience.
